  3. Aging
  4. Senior Centers and Wellness Programs

Senior Centers and Wellness Programs

Senior Centers

Status: Open

Monday, July 6, 2026

Senior Centers are operating on a normal schedule.

Start "Living Longer, Living Well" by joining one of our 21 senior centers. Membership is free to seniors 60 years or older (or 50 years of age at Fleming, Hereford and Lansdowne-Baltimore Highlands senior centers) who can:

  • An in-person class or special event at a senior center
  • Exercise at a fitness center
  • Connect to a virtual or hybrid program through the OPAL Center
  • Participate in a community-wide program, such as:
    • Cycling Seniors (CSBC)
    • Senior Box Office (SBO, available to seniors 55 and older)
    • Senior Craft Gallery

Looking for a Boost to your Health and Well-Being?

BCDA has partnered with BetterAge to help you get the most out of your own life, on your own terms. BetterAge offers a free and confidential 7-10 minute assessment about your health and well-being. Small steps today can make a big difference. See what small steps might make sense for you at BetterAge! Complete the anonymous survey to help BCDA learn how to better support older adults in the community.

ANNUAL SENIOR CENTER REGISTRATION

Individuals wishing to participate must complete the following annual registration forms at one senior center only. Caregivers and companions must also register if coming with their care recipient. 

  • Member Registration Form (to be signed at center)
  • Exercise and Photo/Video Release
  • Nutritional Health Malnutrition Screening

CONTACT INFORMATION

Connect with a senior center or community program. View the senior centers on a map of Baltimore County. 

Displaying 23 results

Senior Centers and Wellness Programs

Senior Centers

Status: Open

Monday, July 6, 2026

Senior Centers are operating on a normal schedule.

Start "Living Longer, Living Well" by joining one of our 21 senior centers. Membership is free to seniors 60 years or older (or 50 years of age at Fleming, Hereford and Lansdowne-Baltimore Highlands senior centers) who can:

  • An in-person class or special event at a senior center
  • Exercise at a fitness center
  • Connect to a virtual or hybrid program through the OPAL Center
  • Participate in a community-wide program, such as:
    • Cycling Seniors (CSBC)
    • Senior Box Office (SBO, available to seniors 55 and older)
    • Senior Craft Gallery

Looking for a Boost to your Health and Well-Being?

BCDA has partnered with BetterAge to help you get the most out of your own life, on your own terms. BetterAge offers a free and confidential 7-10 minute assessment about your health and well-being. Small steps today can make a big difference. See what small steps might make sense for you at BetterAge! Complete the anonymous survey to help BCDA learn how to better support older adults in the community.

ANNUAL SENIOR CENTER REGISTRATION

Individuals wishing to participate must complete the following annual registration forms at one senior center only. Caregivers and companions must also register if coming with their care recipient. 

  • Member Registration Form (to be signed at center)
  • Exercise and Photo/Video Release
  • Nutritional Health Malnutrition Screening

  • An in-person class or special event at a senior center
  • Exercise at a fitness center
  • Connect to a virtual or hybrid program through the OPAL Center
  • Participate in a community-wide program, such as:
    • Cycling Seniors (CSBC)
    • Senior Box Office (SBO, available to seniors 55 and older)
    • Senior Craft Gallery

Looking for a Boost to your Health and Well-Being?

BCDA has partnered with BetterAge to help you get the most out of your own life, on your own terms. BetterAge offers a free and confidential 7-10 minute assessment about your health and well-being. Small steps today can make a big difference. See what small steps might make sense for you at BetterAge! Complete the anonymous survey to help BCDA learn how to better support older adults in the community.

Individuals wishing to participate must complete the following annual registration forms at one senior center only. Caregivers and companions must also register if coming with their care recipient. 

  • Member Registration Form (to be signed at center)
  • Exercise and Photo/Video Release
